film.title: Insaaf
film.overview: When Avinash, a lecturer, punishes some of his students for misbehaving, they turn his life upside down by abducting and molesting his blind sister in order to get even with him.

dialogues.dialogue: Just wait and watch! I've planned everything in such a way that professor won't....come to the college tomorrow. You know some of them are quite shameless also. Today is his first and last day. -Let's have a bet of 100 on it. -Sure.
This was my offense. No, my son. You didn't violate any law. No matter what people say, but I'm not ashamed of my son. lnfact I'm proud of you. Mother!
What a bite! Come on, bite me. Bite me. When you bite me a tickling sensation runs in my body. You shameless man! I'll kill you. No! Don't worry. I'm here.
No, my son. You didn't violate any law. No matter what people say, but I'm not ashamed of my son. lnfact I'm proud of you. Mother! Come on, let's go home.
